flashcards.back: A declarative statement that is either TRUE or FALSE.

flashcards.front: What is the truth value of p ∧ q when p=F and q=T?
flashcards.back: FALSE (Both operands must be TRUE for AND to be TRUE)

flashcards.front: What does the exclusive OR (XOR) represent?
flashcards.back: A connective that is TRUE when exactly one of the operands is TRUE.

flashcards.front: What is the operator precedence order?

flashcards.back: Only when both p and q are FALSE.
